Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ninecloud Court]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — The Ninecloud Court is a royal court with lanterns holding glowing, golden jewels.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — The Ninecloud Court is a faction that plunders Ghostwater and possesses significant knowledge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The Ninecloud Court is a delegation in Ghostwater.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — The Ninecloud Court makes a floating castle for the winner of the second round of the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Ninecloud Court is ruled by Sha Miara.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The Ninecloud Court hosts the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — The Ninecloud Court sent superior propulsion and navigational constructs to the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Ninecloud Court has a representative.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Ninecloud Court is a location with light that can pull individuals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Ninecloud Court offers hospitality within a tower for fourteen days before the tournament begins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Ninecloud Court is located in Ninecloud City.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Ninecloud Court provides Monarch's hospitality to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Ninecloud Court would not offend Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — The Ninecloud Court tournament staff selects visions to share with the audience.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Ninecloud Court has a viewing tower made of Forged madra and stained glass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Ninecloud Court provides protection and enforcement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Ninecloud Court has methods of restoring souls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Ninecloud Court holds most of the top ten ranks in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — The Ninecloud Court prepared a battlefield for two Blackflames.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Ninecloud Court is a location or faction associated with Sha Miara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Ninecloud Court believes in decorating training rooms.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon was in a hallway in the Ninecloud Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The audience hall of the Ninecloud Court is filled with colored tiles and pillars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The Ninecloud Court is led by the Luminous Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The Ninecloud Court is associated with a rainbow-shrouded Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The Ninecloud Court has a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — The Ninecloud Court is an entity that cannot provoke the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Ninecloud Court is characterized by opulence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Ninecloud Court is a location Lindon is ushered away from by Charity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Ninecloud Court has announced its support for Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Ninecloud Court provided a present for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — The Ninecloud Court audience chamber is where Monarchs usually gather.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — The Ninecloud Court provides broad, open training rooms.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — The Ninecloud Court values friendship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — The Ninecloud Court contains an Akura tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The group left the Ninecloud Court in the morning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — The Ninecloud Court produces cloud fortresses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel obtained herbs from the Ninecloud Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — The Ninecloud Court can install redundant security scripts in a cloudbase.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — The Ninecloud Court is a location where Lindon and his companions are staying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — The Ninecloud Court releases tournament recordings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Ninecloud Court uses high-quality viewing constructs.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — The Ninecloud Court provides scripts for cloudbases.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Ninecloud Court is more impressive than the Blackflame Empire's displays.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — The Ninecloud Court has a royal madra.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — The Ninecloud Court sends foreign emissaries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Ninecloud Court is associated with the Sha family.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Much of the material in Lindon's pocket world came from the Ninecloud Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — The Ninecloud Court is associated with the Queen's Gift.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — The Ninecloud Court is a human-dominated faction.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
